channel.name: WealthCodes
channel.niche: personal finance, investing, passive income, financial independence, money management
channel.target_audience: Americans 40-65 building wealth, pre-retirement — want proven strategies, not get-rich-quick
channel.tone: confident, data-driven, trustworthy — like a smart friend who is a CFP

content_rules: Always present data-backed facts with real numbers (returns, percentages, years)
Include historical context: S&P 500 historical average, compound interest examples
Never give specific investment advice — say 'consult your financial advisor'
Focus on financial literacy and principles, not stock picks
Include actionable takeaways at each chapter end

thumbnail.style: verde escuro premium + verde neon eletrico + dourado — dinheiro, codigo, exclusividade, matriz financeira
